header: BTS Shanghai | Data Analytics Platform in Healthcare Software Engineering Intern
bullets: Collaborated with colleagues during an internship for a consulting company in Shanghai with primary focus on developing and implementing an incentives program for US plasma donation company

Architected and built a scalable backend using Node.js, Express, and MongoDB to manage donor user profiles, transaction history, and rewards, implementing RESTful APIs to ensure stability in data models and accurate recording of donor information for healthcare clients

Leveraged Python and statistical analysis of US Census and industry data to engineer a predictive pricing engine for compensation to plasma donors in US healthcare facilities, thus optimizing compensation rates
